tasks.subject: Task 1: Synthesize the 4 SFX WAVs (sfx_gen.py + assets)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** generate_sfx(out_dir) writes 4 original WAVs + committed assets/sfx/*.wav.

**Files:** Create src/blueball/sfx_gen.py + assets/sfx/{whoosh,spring,key,fanfare}.wav; Test tests/test_sfx_gen.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- generate_sfx writes 4 valid mono 16-bit WAVs >0 frames.
- 4 committed assets exist under assets/sfx/.

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_sfx_gen.py -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/sfx_gen.py", "src/blueball/assets/sfx/whoosh.wav", "src/blueball/assets/sfx/spring.wav", "src/blueball/assets/sfx/key.wav", "src/blueball/assets/sfx/fanfare.wav", "tests/test_sfx_gen.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_sfx_gen.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["generate_sfx writes 4 valid WAVs >0 frames", "4 committed assets exist"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SoundManager + config flag (audio.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SoundManager loads + plays SFX, silent no-op when audio unavailable.

**Files:** Create src/blueball/audio.py; Modify src/blueball/config.py (AUDIO_ENABLED=True); Test tests/test_audio.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- SoundManager constructs + play never raises headless.
- BLUEBALL_NO_AUDIO=1 -> enabled False, play no-op.

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_audio.py -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/audio.py", "src/blueball/config.py", "tests/test_audio.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_audio.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SoundManager constructs + play never raises", "BLUEBALL_NO_AUDIO disables"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: World sound-event queue + collision emits (world.py, collision.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** World.sound_events queue filled by collision begin-handlers (boost/spring/key/goal).

**Files:** Modify src/blueball/world.py, src/blueball/collision.py; Test tests/test_sound_events.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- fresh World sound_events==[]; emit_sound appends.
- player overlapping Goal/Key/Spring/BoostPad then stepping queues fanfare/key/spring/whoosh.

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_sound_events.py -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/world.py", "src/blueball/collision.py", "tests/test_sound_events.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_sound_events.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["emit_sound appends; fresh empty", "Goal/Key/Spring/BoostPad contact queues right name", "trainer determinism tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: PlayScene drains the queue (scenes/play.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PlayScene owns a SoundManager and plays every queued sound each frame.

**Files:** Modify src/blueball/scenes/play.py; Test tests/test_play_audio.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- after update with a queued sound, SoundManager received it and world.sound_events emptied.

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_play_audio.py -q && .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/scenes/play.py", "tests/test_play_audio.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_play_audio.py -q && .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["update drains queued sound to SoundManager + empties queue", "full suite green"]}
```
